'''Skydove Freight''' was a shipping (and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]]) company owned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] [[Anjiliac]]. It was based on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. As with [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara's]] other operations, it originally did not deal in [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], merely [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]].

==Behind the scenes==
Skydove can't be assigned an era, as the adventure ''Tempest Feud'' does have a predetermined one. It could have existed anywhere between [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]] and [[40 BBY/Legends|40 BBY]], though the adventure as is requires an intact [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], which fell to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].
